name: Brunswick Stew (Soup)
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Beef stew meat, bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large heavy kettle, heat bacon fat.
2. Add onions and sauté until lightly browned.
3. Dust the beef with 1 tablespoon of flour and add it to the kettle along with the chicken. Brown the meat slightly.
4. Add the ham, cold water, salt, black pepper, red pepper flakes, and thyme.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 2 hours covered, or until the meat is tender.
6. Remove the meats from the stock and strain the stock. Skim any excess fat from the stock and return it to the kettle.
7. Remove chicken from bones, discard the skin, and cut into bite-size pieces. Return the meats to the kettle, adding all remaining ingredients except okra, beans, and parsley.
8. Bring the mixture to a boil and simmer, covered, for 45 minutes.
9. Add okra and beans and cook for an additional 15 minutes.
10. Garnish with fresh parsley before serving.
